task_completion.description: Verify that a folder named 'Unsubscribe' has been created in the email client.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The folder pane or sidebar of the email client displays a folder named 'Unsubscribe'.

task_completion.description: Verify that at least eight emails have been moved into the 'Unsubscribe' folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Unsubscribe' folder is selected/open, and the message list shows at least 8 emails inside it.

task_completion.description: Verify that the emails moved to the 'Unsubscribe' folder belong to at least two distinct mailing lists.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The senders, subjects, or mailing list indicators (like [List-Name] in the subject) of the emails in the 'Unsubscribe' folder show at least two clearly different mailing list sources.

task_completion.description: Verify that at least two unsubscribe request emails have been drafted to the respective list administrators.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Drafts' folder or open composer windows show at least two emails addressed to administrative, request, or unsubscribe email addresses (e.g., list-request@..., unsubscribe@...).

task_completion.description: Verify that a notification email to the IT admin has been drafted with the correct subject and content.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A drafted email is visible addressed to 'it-admin@techcorp.org' with the exact subject 'Unsubscribe Audit', and the body contains a list of the mailing lists being left.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used a graphical email client to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a standard GUI email application (like Thunderbird, Evolution, or a webmail interface) being used, rather than terminal commands or scripts manipulating maildir files directly.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually used the email composer to draft the messages.
integrity.visual_evidence: Drafts are seen within the email client's composer window or Drafts folder, complete with standard email fields (To, Subject, Body), not just written into a basic text editor.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not simply copy and paste the task instructions into the drafts.
integrity.visual_evidence: The body of the notification email lists specific mailing list names found in the inbox, rather than pasting the literal text of the task description.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified requirements: 1. Target folder must be named 'Unsubscribe'. 2. At least 8 emails must be moved to this folder. 3. The moved emails must come from at least 2 distinct mailing lists. 4. At least 2 unsubscribe request emails must be drafted to list administrators. 5. A notification email must be drafted to 'it-admin@techcorp.org' with the subject 'Unsubscribe Audit'.
